title: VT1 Fibreglass Pickleball Paddle - Lightweight Beginner Paddle with 11mm Polypropylene Core, PU Grip & Edge Guard - Standard Widebody Shape for Control, Manoeuvrability & Forgiveness
features: Lightweight & Beginner-Friendly: Weighing just 210g (7.4oz), the VT1 offers easy manoeuvrability and enhanced control, making it ideal for recreational players and those new to pickleball.
Durable Fibreglass Face: Built with a strong fibreglass hitting surface and a 26.5cm face (10.4"), this paddle delivers excellent spin, easy power generation and reliable all-around performance.
Powerful Polypropylene Core: The 11mm (0.4") thick polypropylene (PP) core offers a balanced blend of power and touch, helping players hit with confidence while learning the basics.
Comfortable PU Grip: A 13.5cm (5.3") PU grip with a 10.5cm (4.1") circumference ensures a comfortable hold and promotes quicker hand speed during rallies.
Protective Edge Guard Design: Designed with a 13mm (0.5") edge guard, this standard-shape paddle offers enhanced durability and court-ready protection without sacrificing playability.
description: Product Description Beginner-Oriented Paddle Engineered with a 26.5cm x 40cm beginner-optimized design , this paddle strikes the perfect balance between control and reach . The wider face enhances shot accuracy, while the extended length boosts power and spin potential. Get a Confident Hold Designed with a 13.5cm PU ergonomic grip with a 10.5cm circumference , this paddle ensures superior control, reduced hand fatigue, and a secure, non-slip feel even during intense rallies. The cushioned PU material absorbs vibration for smooth, stable swings , giving players the confidence to play longer and perform at their best with every stroke. Lightweight Power, Effortless Control Weighing just 210g , this pickleball paddle offers the ideal balance of speed, maneuverability, and precision . The lighter design allows for quick reactions at the net and longer play without fatigue , while still delivering the power and stability needed for confident, controlled shots. Performance, Endurance or... Both! Featuring a 13mm edge guard , 11mm polypropylene core , and a reinforced fiberglass hitting surface . Enjoy crisp ball response, controlled touch, and lasting strength through every rally. Designed to handle intense play while maintaining lightweight feel and superior shot consistency , it’s the perfect blend of power, protection, and precision .
